candidate_definitions.text: Official repository of Spiking-FullSubNet, the Intel N-DNS Challenge Algorithmic Track Winner.

Spiking-FullSubNet is the 1st Place Winner solution of the Intel N-DNS Challenge (Track 1: Algorithmic). This repository serves as the official implementation of our paper: "Toward Ultralow-Power Neuromorphic Speech Enhancement With Spiking-FullSubNet" (IEEE TNNLS, 2025).

candidate_glosses.text: Spiking-FullSubNet is the 1st Place Winner solution of the Intel N-DNS Challenge (Track 1: Algorithmic). This repository serves as the official implementation of our paper: "Toward Ultralow-Power Neuromorphic Speech Enhancement With Spiking-FullSubNet" (IEEE TNNLS, 2025).
